problem: What encryption survives quantum computer attacks — post-quantum cryptography
mechanism: Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics
hypothesis: What encryption survives quantum computer attacks — post-quantum cryptography remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Monte. Monte Carlo tree search with learned heuristics directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Benchmark on standard dataset with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
